mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPIAUCSL reading above 210 signals elevated inflation, prompting central bank rate hikes that reduce equity valuations and produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 210 despite the negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and payrolls (PAYEMS) signals robust economic expansion, driving corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint growth of INDPRO and PAYEMS fails to produce positive 20d returns in > 70% of cases, or the interaction effect's t-statistic falls below 1.96.

mechanism_narrative: In a tight labor market (UNRATE < 5%), rising wage pressures drive corporate profit margins, resulting in positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX fails to produce positive 60d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE remains below 5%, or the regression coefficient for UNRATE in this regime is not statistically significant (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Positive quarterly GDP growth (GDPC1) indicates strong aggregate demand, boosting corporate revenues and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX fails to produce positive 20d returns in > 60% of quarters with GDPC1 growth above 2%, or the correlation between GDPC1 and SPX returns drops below 0.15.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly HOUST reading above 500 signals strong housing demand, stimulating construction activity and corporate earnings, which drive positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where HOUST exceeds 500, or the signal's Sharpe ratio falls below 0.5.

mechanism_narrative: Strong consumer spending (RSAFS) combined with stable inflation (CPIAUCSL < 210) indicates a balanced economic environment, supporting equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined effect of RSAFS and CPIAUCSL fails to produce positive 20d returns in > 70% of cases where CPIAUCSL remains below 210, or the interaction term's coefficient is not statistically significant (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: During a monetary tightening cycle (FEDFUNDS > 2%), rising interest rates increase discount rates for equity cash flows, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 2%, or the regression coefficient for FEDFUNDS in this regime is not statistically significant (p > 0.05).
